## Platform
Which AI platform does this affect?
- [ ] ChatGPT
- [ ] Claude
- [ ] Copilot

## Feature
Name of the feature that needs updating.

## Current Information
What the tracker currently shows.

## Correct Information
What it should show.

## Source
Link to official documentation or announcement confirming the correct information.

## Additional Context
Any other relevant details.
